item.title: KMUYSL Big Red Barn Farm Animal Playsets Recalled Due to Risk of Serious Injury or Death from Choking; Violates Small Parts Ban; Sold on Amazon by MISSJUNE
item.company: Online at Amazon.com from July 2023 through June 2025 for about $20.
item.brand: Online at Amazon.com from July 2023 through June 2025 for about $20.
item.product: KMUYSL Big Red Barn Farm Animal Playsets
item.summary: This recall involves KMUYSL Big Red Barn Farm Animal Playsets. The children's toy sets consist of one red barn, one farmer figure and nine animal figures, including a cow, donkey, duck, sheep, chicken, goose, horse, pig and rabbit. The barn measures 9.6 inches long by 4.4 inches wide by 8.8 inches high, the size of the animal figures are about 1.8 inches long by 2 inches wide. The model number "SY-MZ7S-TVMV" is printed on the label located on the back of the packaging.
item.affectedPeople: Consumers who purchased: KMUYSL Big Red Barn Farm Animal Playsets.
item.remedy: Consumers should stop using the recalled toys immediately, take them away from children and contact MISSJUNE for a full refund. Consumers will be asked to remove and properly dispose of the fence handles into the trash and send a photo of the disposed product to kmuyslfarmanimalrecall@gmail.com to receive a full refund.
item.payoutAmount: Repair, refund, replacement, or other remedy if stated by the CPSC notice
